-------------------------------- MODULE Sets_CardinalitySetMinus --------------------------------
EXTENDS Integers, NaturalsInduction, TLAPS
  \** NB: Module NaturalsInduction comes from the TLAPS library, usually
  \** installed in /usr/local/lib/tlaps. Make sure this is in your Toolbox
  \** search path, see Preferences/TLA+ Preferences.

IsBijection(f, S, T) == /\ f \in [S -> T]
                        /\ \A x, y \in S : (x # y) => (f[x] # f[y])
                        /\ \A y \in T : \E x \in S : f[x] = y


IsFiniteSet(S) == \E n \in Nat : \E f : IsBijection(f, 1..n, S)

(****************************************************************************)
(* Finite sets and cardinality are defined in the TLA+ standard module      *)
(* FiniteSets, but this is not yet natively supported by TLAPS. For the     *)
(* time being, we use the following axiom for defining set cardinality.     *)
(****************************************************************************)
\* Cardinality(S) == CHOOSE n : (n \in Nat) /\ \E f : IsBijection(f, 1..n, S)

CONSTANT Cardinality(_)
AXIOM CardinalityAxiom ==
         \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) =>
           \A n : (n = Cardinality(S)) <=>
                    (n \in Nat) /\ \E f : IsBijection(f, 1..n, S)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityInNat == \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => Cardinality(S) \in Nat
  PROOF OMITTED

------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityZero ==
           /\ IsFiniteSet({})
           /\ Cardinality({}) = 0
           /\ \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (Cardinality(S)=0) => (S = {})
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM CardinalityPlusOne ==
    ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S),
           NEW x, x \notin S
    PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(S \cup {x})
           /\ Cardinality(S \cup {x}) = Cardinality(S) + 1
  PROOF OMITTED

------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityOne == \A m : /\ IsFiniteSet({m})
                                 /\ Cardinality({m}) = 1
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM CardinalityTwo == \A m, p : m # p => 
                              /\ IsFiniteSet({m,p})
                              /\ Cardinality({m,p}) = 2
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM IntervalCardinality ==  
  ASSUME NEW a \in Nat, NEW b \in Nat 
  PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(a..b)
         /\ Cardinality(a..b) = IF a > b THEN 0 ELSE b-a+1
  PROOF OMITTED

------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityOneConverse ==
   ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S), Cardinality(S) = 1
   PROVE  \E m : S = {m}
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM IsBijectionInverse ==
  ASSUME NEW f, NEW S, NEW T, 
         IsBijection(f, S, T) 
  PROVE  \E g : IsBijection(g, T, S)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM IsBijectionTransitive ==
  ASSUME NEW f1, NEW f2, NEW S, NEW T, NEW U, 
           IsBijection(f1, S, U),
           IsBijection(f2, U, T) 
  PROVE  \E g : IsBijection(g, S, T)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM IsBijectionCardinality ==
  \A f, S, T : /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
               /\ IsFiniteSet(T)
               => (IsBijection(f, S, T) <=> Cardinality(S) = Cardinality(T))

LEMMA CardinalitySetMinus ==
      ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S),
             NEW x \in S
      PROVE /\ IsFiniteSet(S \ {x})
            /\ Cardinality(S \ {x}) = Cardinality(S) - 1
PROOF OBVIOUS

item.text: I’ve got the main route: unfold the finite-set witness for `S`, remove the preimage of `x`, and build the skipped-index bijection. Now I’ll patch a structured proof and let TLAPS identify any weak steps.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "apply_patch <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: Sets_CardinalitySetMinus.tla
@@
 LEMMA CardinalitySetMinus ==
       ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S),
              NEW x \\in S
       PROVE /\\ IsFiniteSet(S \\ {x})
             /\\ Cardinality(S \\ {x}) = Cardinality(S) - 1
-PROOF OBVIOUS
+PROOF
+<1> DEFINE T == S \\ {x}
+<1>1. x \\notin T
+  BY DEF T
+<1>2. T \\cup {x} = S
+  BY DEF T
+<1>3. Cardinality(S) \\in Nat
+  BY CardinalityInNat
+<1>4. Cardinality(S) # 0
+  BY <1>2, CardinalityZero
+<1>5. Cardinality(S) > 0
+  BY <1>3, <1>4, SMT
+<1>6. \\E f : IsBijection(f, 1..Cardinality(S), S)
+  BY <1>3, CardinalityAxiom
+<1>7. PICK f : IsBijection(f, 1..Cardinality(S), S)
+  BY <1>6
+<1>8. \\E k \\in 1..Cardinality(S) : f[k] = x
+  BY <1>7 DEF IsBijection
+<1>9. PICK k \\in 1..Cardinality(S) : f[k] = x
+  BY <1>8
+<1>10. DEFINE g == [i \\in 1..(Cardinality(S)-1) |->
+                       IF i < k THEN f[i] ELSE f[i+1]]
+<1>11. IsBijection(g, 1..(Cardinality(S)-1), T)
+  <2>1. g \\in [1..(Cardinality(S)-1) -> T]
+    BY <1>7, <1>9, SMT DEF g, T, IsBijection
+  <2>2. \\A i, j \\in 1..(Cardinality(S)-1) :
+          (i # j) => (g[i] # g[j])
+    BY <1>7, <1>9, SMT DEF g, IsBijection
+  <2>3. \\A y \\in T : \\E i \\in 1..(Cardinality(S)-1) : g[i] = y
+    BY <1>7, <1>9, SMT DEF g, T, IsBijection
+  <2>4. QED
+    BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3 DEF IsBijection
+<1>12. IsFiniteSet(T)
+  BY <1>11, <1>3 DEF IsFiniteSet
+<1>13. Cardinality(T) = Cardinality(S) - 1
+  BY <1>3, <1>11, <1>12, CardinalityAxiom
+<1>14. QED
+  BY <1>12, <1>13 DEF T
 
 =============================================================================
*** End Patch
PATCH
~/.tlapm15/bin/tlapm -I ~/.tlapm15/lib/tlaps Sets_CardinalitySetMinus.tla"
